zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix de Dundas於1416年出生在蘇格蘭Linlithgowshire登達斯 卡素時，她的父親James Dundas21歲，母親Elizabeth Livingston16歲。她於1440年與John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk在蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1459年在蘇格蘭Linlithgowshire享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dundas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Angus and Midlothian) and Irish (Fermanagh): habitational name from Dundas, a place near Edinburgh, Scotland, which is named from Gaelic dùn ‘hill’ + deas ‘south’.
History: A family of this name is descended from Gospatrick, Earl of March (died 1139), whose grandson was Helia de Dundas.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix de Dundas was born in 1416, in Dundas Castle, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, her father, James Dundas, was 21 and her mother, Elizabeth Livingston, was 16. She married John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk in 1440, in Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1459, in Linlithgowshire, Scotland, at the age of 43.

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Dundas(이)가 1416년 스컷랜드 Linlithgowshire 던다스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Dundas(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Livingston(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1440년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1459년 스컷랜드 Linlithgowshire에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.
